channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 150,000 — Goodhope Incomplete house for sale at 85%! (Goodhope, Harare West)
item.description: USD 150,000 — Goodhope, Harare West. 4 beds, 3 baths. Goodhope Incomplete house for sale at 85%!. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
